meta.title: Varto Çekici | 24/7 Towing & Roadside Assistance — Muş Varto
meta.description: 24/7 towing and roadside assistance in Varto, Hınıs, Muş and surrounding regions of Eastern Turkey. Call now: +90 553 181 57 91. City, intercity, off-road, battery, tire, fuel and lockout services.
meta.keywords: Varto towing, Muş towing, Varto roadside assistance, Hınıs tow truck, Varto auto recovery, 24/7 towing Muş, off road recovery Varto, Erzurum Muş highway towing

body.heading: Data Controller
body.text: This notice has been prepared by Varto Çekici Oto Kurtarma (the "Business") under Turkish Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 ("KVKK").

body.heading: Personal Data Processed
body.text: When you visit our site, your IP address and browser information may be collected automatically for technical reasons. When you contact us via phone or WhatsApp, your name, phone number, vehicle and location details are processed solely to provide you with service.

body.heading: Purposes of Processing
body.text: Your data is processed to deliver towing and roadside assistance services, to communicate with customers, to improve service quality, and to fulfill legal obligations.

body.heading: Data Sharing
body.text: Your personal data is not shared with third parties without your explicit consent, except for lawful requests from public authorities.

body.heading: Your Rights
body.text: Under Article 11 of KVKK, you have the right to access, correct, delete, or restrict the processing of your data. Requests can be sent to vartocekici@gmail.com.

body.heading: What Are Cookies?
body.text: Cookies are small text files placed in your browser by the websites you visit. They help the site work better and allow your visit to be analyzed.

body.heading: Cookies We Use
body.text: We only use essential functional cookies along with anonymous measurement cookies from Vercel Analytics and Vercel Speed Insights, which do not contain personal identifiers.

body.heading: Third-Party Cookies
body.text: Vercel infrastructure cookies may be used for measurement and performance data. This data cannot be linked to identifiable individuals.

body.heading: Your Cookie Choices
body.text: You can delete or block cookies in your browser settings. Disabling some cookies may cause certain features of the site to malfunction.

body.heading: Contact
body.text: For questions about our cookie policy, please contact vartocekici@gmail.com.
